name: Bastogi S.p.A.
summary: Bastogi S.p.A., through its subsidiaries, operates in the real estate, entertainment, art and culture, and other sectors in Italy. The company develops and operates real estate properties; manages multi-purpose venues for music, shows, and sport, as well as venues held through concessions; and produces musical and theatre contents. It also hosts presentations, business conventions, conferences, shows, fashion shows, exhibitions, cultural appointments, photo shoots, receptions, and gala dinners; and provides integrated services for the management, enhancement, and conservation of works of art and precious objects. In addition, the company manages a four star business hotel; and offers trade services to small and medium companies, as well as a range of services in the education and training, food and wine, design, and organization and location for events. Bastogi S.p.A. was founded in 1862 and is based in Milan, Italy.
